title: 买车这事不简单
content: The author reflects on car ownership costs through two examples: a neighbor who bought a 260,000 RMB Tank 300 in 2020, drove only 36,000 km in six years, and lost roughly 170,000 RMB in depreciation and expenses; and a friend who earned 1 million RMB during a short-lived e-commerce boom, bought an Audi A6 for 390,000 RMB, suffered nearly 500,000 RMB in total losses, and later fell into unemployment. Both cases illustrate how vehicle purchases—especially luxury ones driven minimally—can severely erode wealth, particularly when income proves unstable.

title: Ten years of ClickHouse in open source
content: ClickHouse, an open-source analytical database, began in 2009 as Alexey Milovidov's experimental solution for high-volume web analytics at Yandex. Frustrated by existing databases' inability to handle billions of records daily, he developed prototypes (OLAPServer and Metrage) combining column-oriented storage with real-time updates. Evolving into ClickHouse, it launched publicly on June 15, 2016. Built entirely from scratch in C++, it now leads its category with 2,000+ contributors, emphasizing transparent development practices, code quality, and contributor recognition.

title: The ISA Doesn't Matter Where It Counts
content: The author argues that processor instruction set architecture (ISA) is largely irrelevant for most computing tasks. Software runs well across different ISAs because compilers, operating systems, and modern optimization techniques abstract away hardware differences. Performance bottlenecks typically stem from memory hierarchy, parallelism, and algorithmic efficiency rather than ISA choice. What matters more is ecosystem maturity, tooling, and vendor support.

title: 推特就是全世界人民的弱智吧 | 原文
content: X's automatic translation feature has transformed the platform into a global "idiot bar" where users worldwide share absurd, pseudo-philosophical observations. Since all content now appears in users' system languages, nonsensical posts—like "the compass was invented before the clock, so direction matters more than time"—circulate across language barriers, creating a universal space for bizarre, unserious content.

title: 10岁开始抗衰老，美国小孩已经被流量逼疯了 | 原文
content: American children as young as 10 are developing anti-aging anxieties driven by social media influence. Preteens flock to beauty retailers like Sephora, purchasing skincare products meant for adults. This trend reflects how appearance and age-related anxieties, fueled by online traffic and influencer culture, now affect all age groups globally. Similar to young Chinese adults engaging in extreme dieting, foreign children are prematurely performing adulthood through beauty consumption.

title: “梁文锋”们，上市有门了
content:
China's securities regulator announced on June 17, 2026 that the STAR Market's fifth listing standard, which allows unprofitable but high-growth tech firms to go public, will expand to cover AI large language model companies. Previously limited to biotech firms, this change enables firms like DeepSeek, Zhipu, and MiniMax—characterized by heavy R&D spending, significant losses, and rapid revenue growth—to list domestically.

The move follows successful Hong Kong IPOs by Zhipu and MiniMax in early 2026, which achieved trillion-HKD valuations despite losses exceeding 4.7 billion yuan. Strict qualifying requirements apply: companies must have launched a large model with scaled application, demonstrate technical leadership through parameter benchmarks, present clear business plans, and meet data security compliance standards.

title: 安踏发布“折纸科技”，试图从结构设计寻找跑鞋缓震新方向
content: Anta launched "FOLD" (ANTA FOLD), a new running shoe technology platform developed with Oxford, Tianjin, and Zhejiang universities. Unlike traditional material-based cushioning, it uses origami-engineered folding structures for controlled deformation and energy management. The debut shoe, H1, features 14 Waterbomb negative-Poisson's-ratio units for adaptive cushioning and stability. Future variants Z1 and M1 will target gait efficiency and energy return respectively. This structural innovation approach follows industry trends as material advances plateau, joining Nike's Air, On's CloudTec, and Adidas' 3D-printed soles in the competitive shift toward geometric design solutions.

title: 卖不完的粽子，都去哪儿了？
content: After the Dragon Boat Festival, unsold zongzi are disposed of quickly to reduce storage costs. Retailers first discount them heavily, as vacuum-packed versions last 6–9 months and frozen ones 12–18 months. Unsold stock may be returned to manufacturers if contracts allow, then redistributed as employee福利, sold to restaurants, or offloaded to discount platforms. Some expired or near-expired zongzi go to feed factories for animal feed. Companies like Hema use algorithm-driven demand forecasting and flexible production to minimize post-holiday surplus. Regulations require proper disposal of expired seasonal food to prevent re-entry into the market.

title: 油价重回7元时代，油车有救了？
content: China's fuel prices saw their first two consecutive decreases this year, dropping 92-octane gasoline to around 7 yuan per liter in some regions. Despite this, the article argues oil prices are not the decisive factor in fuel vehicle sales decline. Data from January-May 2026 shows traditional fuel vehicle sales fell, but market-wide trends—including new energy vehicle growth driven by technology upgrades and shifting consumer preferences—explain the decline better than oil price fluctuations. High oil prices only marginally affected entry-level and commercial fuel vehicles, while mid-to-high-end models remained stable. The upcoming new battery safety standards on July 1 will further strengthen new energy vehicles' competitiveness.

title: AI越强，越要“杀死”过去的自己
content: As AI agents now match or outperform humans in 80% of tasks—up from 50% six months ago—workers must abandon the instinct to protect their most "irreplaceable" skills. A Goldman Sachs executive advises letting go of old habits entirely to embrace a completely new professional identity. Future competitiveness lies not in competing with AI on skills, but in exercising judgment, intuition, and values to direct it. Organizations need strong leadership, clear outcome metrics, and clean data infrastructure to transform workflows around human-AI collaboration rather than merely optimizing existing processes.

title: 机器人技术会迎来 ChatGPT 式的爆发时刻吗
content: Robot technology will not experience a single ChatGPT-style breakthrough moment. Instead, progress depends on steady advances across AI tools coordination, hardware iteration, and accumulated real-world deployment. Five key realities shape the field: demonstrations differ vastly from practical applications; training data for physical environments remains severely limited; no universal AI model can handle all robot forms and scenarios; hardware like flexible actuators still faces bottlenecks; and practical value emerges only from mundane tasks tested in actual customer settings. The industry will grow through gradual, incremental improvements rather than miracle breakthroughs.

title: 人类竟然比统计机器还便宜？AI无法取代你的饭碗，但这绝不是什么好消息
content: A critique argues that AI remains far more expensive than human labor, undermining predictions of mass automation. "Tokenmaxxing"—measuring worker performance by AI usage—drives up costs while degrading skills. MIT research found AI could cost-effectively replace only 23% of entry-level wages. Amazon's cashierless stores failed because AI required costly human oversight. Despite massive subsidies, AI companies hemorrhage losses; rising inference, energy, and chip costs will push prices higher. The author concludes that humans being cheaper than flawed AI systems reflects worker exploitation, not true job security.

A Pew study found only 16% of Americans believe AI will positively impact society in 20 years.

title: 现在的A股，正在惩罚理性者
content: China's A-share market is experiencing extreme divergence: AI stocks surge while fundamentally sound sectors—brokerages, insurance, consumer goods, biotech, and tech platforms—trade at depressed valuations despite solid earnings. The author compares this to 2013's mobile internet bubble, when TMT stocks soared while blue-chip indices languished at 8x PE with 13% profit growth. Such irrationality, driven by capital interests promoting grand narratives, punishes rational investors. Surviving requires either unwavering discipline or contrarian positioning, though timing reversals remains nearly impossible. Ultimately, emotional control matters more than technical skill.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 睿知睿见

title: 库克：苹果将因存储芯片供应问题而涨价
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook announced plans to raise product prices due to soaring memory and storage chip costs, calling the current situation unsustainable. He cited AI server demand diverting DRAM supply from consumer devices, reducing availability and driving prices up. Apple will use cash reserves to secure more memory but will not build its own chip factories, focusing instead on core strengths.

title: Transformer 核心作者离开 DeepMind，转投 OpenAI
content: Noam Shazeer, lead author of the seminal 2017 Transformer paper, has left Google DeepMind to join OpenAI as head of architecture research. He will focus on developing new large model architectures and refining the Transformer. Shazeer previously left Google in 2021 to found Character.AI after it rejected launching his chatbot, returned in 2024 when Google paid $2.7 billion to rehire him as Gemini technical lead, and is now departing again—highlighting tensions between corporate bureaucracy and researchers' desire for rapid productization.

title: DeepSeek 识图模式正式上线 App 和网页端
content: DeepSeek launched an image recognition mode on its web and app platforms, allowing users to upload images for analysis beyond simple text extraction. The feature, labeled as "beta" in the app, runs alongside existing quick and expert modes. In April, DeepSeek disclosed technical details of the underlying multimodal model, introducing a core framework called "Thinking with Visual Primitives."

title: Momenta 港股 IPO 获中国证监会备案
content: China's securities regulator has approved Momenta Global Limited's application for an overseas IPO. The autonomous driving company, operating in China through its Suzhou-based entity, plans to list on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange by issuing up to approximately 43.8 million ordinary shares.

title: 曹操出行发布 RoboX 战略全面向 AI 转型，宣布启动香港 Robotaxi 业务
content: Caocao Mobility launches RoboX strategy, pivoting fully to AI, and initiates Hong Kong Robotaxi operations as its first flagship city globally. The company unveiled "Eva Cab," China's first natively developed Robotaxi, aiming to build a leading physical AI mobility platform. Its "Dual 100,000 Plan" targets deploying 100,000 Robotaxis and 100,000 Robovans by 2030. First-half 2024 efforts focused on streamlining operations, restructuring around AI, and boosting relevant talent and resource investment, with steady ride-hailing growth supporting transformation. The Hong Kong project will test sustained operations across diverse traffic systems and right-hand-drive environments to underpin global expansion.

title: 谷歌开始销售搭载 Gemini 的 Google Home 音箱
content: Google will begin selling its first Gemini-powered Google Home speaker next week for $99.99. The device features an advanced voice assistant with natural language understanding and reasoning capabilities, enabling multi-command processing, complex query handling, conversational memory, and multi-turn dialogue. It has a new design and includes a microphone mute option.

title: 特朗普称苹果将与英特尔合作在美国生产芯片
content: Trump announced that Apple will partner with Intel to design and manufacture chips in the United States. The deal, reached after over a year of discussions, helps Apple diversify chip production beyond TSMC, while providing Intel with stable demand to boost its struggling foundry business. Intel's advanced 18A manufacturing technology recently entered early production. The Trump administration previously acquired a 10% stake in Intel and plans to invest approximately $10 billion in U.S. factory expansion as part of broader efforts to secure domestic semiconductor supply chains and reduce dependence on China. Intel's stock surged over 10% following the announcement. Analysts note that initial Apple chip volumes will be limited, with TSMC retaining about 90% of Apple's supply.

title: TerraPower in Deal with Meta for Eight Natrium 345 MW Advanced Nuclear Plants
content: TerraPower has agreed to supply Meta with eight Natrium 345 MW advanced nuclear reactors. The deal marks a significant commercial commitment for TerraPower's sodium-cooled fast reactor design, which features integrated molten salt energy storage. Meta is procuring the power to meet its growing electricity needs, likely for data centers and AI infrastructure, while pursuing carbon-free energy sources. This represents one of the largest corporate advanced nuclear power purchase agreements to date.

title: AI Agents to Make Sense of Data at OpenAI
How pull request limits are cutting down the noise
content: GitHub introduced pull request limits to help maintainers manage overwhelming submission volumes. The feature caps how many open pull requests non-write users can have in a repository, encouraging contributors to prioritize quality. Draft PRs don't count toward limits, and trusted contributors can be exempted. GitHub plans to add archiving, issue limits, automated bypass signals based on contributor history, and cross-repository controls. Monthly merged pull requests grew from 25 million to 90 million since January 2023, intensifying maintainer burden.
